lines.english: How did Jane receive a letter from a stranger?
lines.chinese: 简是如何收到陌生人的来信的？
lines.raw: How did Jane receive a letter from a stranger? | 简是如何收到陌生人的来信的？

lines.english: My daughter, Jane, never dreamed of receiving a letter from a girl of her own age in Holland.
lines.chinese: 我的女儿简从未想过会收到一个荷兰同龄女孩的来信。
lines.raw: My daughter, Jane, never dreamed of receiving a letter from a girl of her own age in Holland. | 我的女儿简从未想过会收到一个荷兰同龄女孩的来信。

lines.english: Last year, we were travelling across the Channel and Jane put a piece of paper with her name and address on it into a bottle.
lines.chinese: 去年，我们渡海旅行，简把一张写有她姓名和地址的纸条放进了一个瓶子里。
lines.raw: Last year, we were travelling across the Channel and Jane put a piece of paper with her name and address on it into a bottle. | 去年，我们渡海旅行，简把一张写有她姓名和地址的纸条放进了一个瓶子里。

lines.english: She threw the bottle into the sea.
lines.raw: She threw the bottle into the sea. | 她把瓶子扔进了海里。

lines.english: She never thought of it again, but ten months later, she received a letter from a girl in Holland.
lines.chinese: 她再也没想起这件事，但十个月后，她收到了一个荷兰女孩的来信。
lines.raw: She never thought of it again, but ten months later, she received a letter from a girl in Holland. | 她再也没想起这件事，但十个月后，她收到了一个荷兰女孩的来信。

lines.english: Both girls write to each other regularly now.
lines.chinese: 现在两个女孩定期通信。
lines.raw: Both girls write to each other regularly now. | 现在两个女孩定期通信。

lines.english: However, they have decided to use the post office.
lines.chinese: 然而，她们决定使用邮局。
lines.raw: However, they have decided to use the post office. | 然而，她们决定使用邮局。

lines.english: Letters will cost a little more, but they will certainly travel faster.
lines.chinese: 信件会贵一点，但肯定会更快到达。
lines.raw: Letters will cost a little more, but they will certainly travel faster. | 信件会贵一点，但肯定会更快到达。
